assumptions: Bteha & Zemah wind speed treated as m/s (undocumented in source).
Wave timestamps converted from GMT to Israel local time to align with meteo/current series.
Meteo & current timestamps assumed Israel local (unlabeled in source).
Current 'magnitude' per station uses the shallowest (surface) depth as default; a depth-averaged value is also computed.
Map marker positions are approximate, for the stylized map only -- not survey GPS.
excludedColumns: ginosar.WS_ms_Avg (windSpeed) -- Excluded from statistics, risk and ML. Displayed only as a flagged quality issue.
eingev.AirTC_Avg (airTemp) -- NOT converted. Excluded from statistics, risk and ML. Displayed only as a flagged quality issue.
disclaimer: This system is an academic research prototype. Its risk classifications are not official swimming or emergency-safety instructions.
